MINI MINUTES: Terence S. Cox, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff. Peter Labrador, Esq., appearing for Defendant Osprey Boat Company, and Defendant and Cross-Complainant Boat and Motor Mart, and Jay Veach, present in court. Order to Show Cause to Peter Labrador and Jay Veach for failure to appear at the Early Settlement Conference is heard this day. After argument of respective counsel court ordered Peter Labrador, Esq., sanctioned $500.00 for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Local Rule 4.3 F, and Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures Section 11. Court ordered OSC off calendar and dissolved. Proceedings reported by: Loretta Najera, CSR#5153. (212)
